text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around the<n>campus, I
notice an unnatural pile of<n>leaves in my path.
choice_data_list:
(This looks pretty suspicious. I'd better go around
it.)

text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Why'd ya dodge my<n>pitfall?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! My prized pitfall! It got<n>clowned on
before... but still!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Scold me all ya want, but I'm<n>not gonna
stop! Imma keep makin'<n>pitfalls!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Is that right? You really gotta reflect<n>on your
actions. But... I guess you're<n>not all that bad
compared to Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She made the perfect pitfall in a carrot<n>patch and
caused all kinds of trouble<n>for students comin' to
sneak a<n>snack.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Even I can find the pitfalls youmake, so I guess that makes yasome kinda small fry compared to her!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grahhh! Imma totally make a pitfall<n>that's way
better than Golshi's! And<n>it's gonna catch all of
you, you'll see!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she actually made this<n>pitfall to keep
students from eating<n>the carrots, not just to cause
mischief... She just doesn't realize<n>that herself.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! How can people tell?! I hid it<n>perfectly this
time! With leaves!
choice_data_list: That's what made it so obvious.
That's what made it so obvious.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: O-oh! I mean, of course I knew that!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You got a pretty keen eye on ya.<n>Imma make ya
my minion, so help me<n>out!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since I don't have anything pressing<n>to do, I
decide to give her a hand. But<n>then...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: How's that?! I put leaves all over thistime, not just around the hole, so itlooks real natural-like!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Gyuh?! The wind blew 'em all<n>away?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I used rocks to weigh everythin'<n>down this time,
so it's not gonna<n>blow away again! Now I just
gotta<n>pour some water in there to cushion<n>the—
choice_data_list:
The water will just soak into the ground, you
know?

The water will just soak into the ground, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why?! Won't it stay in there<n>like a pool?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... I spread a tarp... insidethe hole... and filled the... hole with...water... Now if someone steps onto it,like so—

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: H-HUH?! Now you can't even fall in?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: WAHHHHH! I have to remake itagain?! I'm pooped! Exhausted!TIRED!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you take a break and try again
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
NUH-UH! No matter how tough my<n>prey, these
fangs o'mine ain't gonna<n>crack!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: That's my rule... as a hunter!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her unwavering drive is magnificent,<n>but I'm
worried about her level of<n>fatigue. What should I
say to her?
choice_data_list: Leave the rest to your trusty minion.
Let's give this all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: No! Nuh-uh! Shut it! You're my minion,so you gotta listen to what I say!
choice_data_list:
It's a leader's duty to delegate work to their
minions.

It's a leader's duty to delegate work to their
minions.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! ...Actually, a hero show I<n>watched the other
day had the leader<n>sitting in their chair the whole
time...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Kay, sure! Put your back into it! Your<n>almighty
leader'll be watchin' ya<n>from right over here!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Shinko Windy resting, I get the<n>job done
smoothly and efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you're done, eh?! Lookin' good!<n>But the
most important thing is that it<n>actually works...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I hear footsteps... Someone's<n>definitely comin' for
a snack! Let's<n>see if yer pitfall does the job!
Hm? She's not here either...<n>Wait—GAHHH?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Nice! We caught someone! You<n>deserve
some praise, minion!
choice_data_list: Maybe later. We have to check up on them first!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! Time to confirm the catch<n>and revel in
our success!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ha. Ha... I was worried I'd pushed ya<n>too far, but
looks like you made a real<n>nice pitfall here.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm gonna have to "reward" ya<n>handsomely
for this one.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although Shinko Windy's effective<n>pitfall earns
her praise, it also catches<n>the innocent Hishi
Amazon... and<n>results in another scolding.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should respect her wishes here. But<n>if she looks
like she's pushing<n>herself too hard, I'll step in to
help.<n>She won't get hurt that way.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Niiice! And that's what makes ya my<n>trusty
minion!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I keep working, following her<n>instructions and
offering occasional<n>advice on crafting pitfalls,
until...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: IT'S FINISHED! Yes, yes, yes! We did<n>it!

Hahaha! Well? Bet you get a totally<n>different
sense of achievement<n>compared to pranking,
right?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama! Uh-huh, totally different! I<n>worked so
hard, thinkin' 'bout how<n>to catch lotsa prey, and I
tweaked it a<n>bunch...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: And now, the prank potential's<n>skyrocketed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... the prank potential's sk—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! Sure, it's a pitfall, but you're<n>using it to
stop students from stealing<n>carrots from the field!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the idea, right? Using a prank<n>to help
others... Somethin' like that?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
What the heck're ya talkin' 'bout?<n>Pranks don't
have nothin' to do with<n>helpin' people!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so Shinko Windy remains a<n>prankster,
through and through.
